item.title: Version 1.1.6
item.description:
New

  • Showcase mode — present your screenshots in a polished multi-frame layout; arrange, resize, and export as a single image
  • Device frames — wrap screenshots in realistic device mockups (iPhone, iPad, MacBook, browser window)

Improvements

  • Expanded sticker gallery with new categories; sticker search now works across all packs
  • Procedural backgrounds — new pattern styles (grid, dots, topography, circuit); all patterns now support custom color tinting

Fixes

  • Fixed sticker import not persisting after restart
  • Fixed procedural background rendering artifacts at non-integer zoom levels

item.title: Version 1.1.5
item.description:
New

  • Stickers — add stickers to screenshots from a built-in gallery; drag to place, rotate and scale with handles; import your own PNG/JPEG stickers
  • Alt word selection — hold Alt with the Marker or Redact tool active to highlight OCR-detected words on hover; click to instantly apply the annotation to that word
  • Double-click on an auto-redacted region to remove it
  • Watermark support — add a custom text or image watermark to exports

Improvements

  • Redrawn toolbar icons for padding, shadow, and corner radius controls
  • Marker cursor now scales with zoom — size matches the actual drawn stroke width at any zoom level
  • Dropdown panels use a solid background instead of the translucent system glass effect
  • Sticker rotation handle is closer to the sticker, line thickness matches the selection outline, and hides when outside the canvas

Fixes

  • Fixed scroll pass-through in zoom/pan mode so panels respond correctly when zoomed in
  • Fixed stale annotation index crashes in text editor closures

item.title: Version 1.1.4
item.description:
Fixes

  • Fixed a crash caused by concurrent image processing — Core Image context is now properly serialized
  • Fixed potential use-after-free when rapidly switching screenshots during effect processing

item.title: Version 1.1.3
item.description:
New

  • Procedural backgrounds
  • Background blur
  • Background Grain
  • Progress indicator - thin bar at the bottom shows during heavy processing

item.title: Version 1.1.2
item.description:
Fixes

  • Fixed app hanging for 5+ seconds on launch — replaced heavy material background with lightweight rendering in the startup notification
  • Non-blocking Sparkle update UI — update dialogs no longer freeze the app (uses sheets instead of modal alerts)
  • Improved crash symbolication — dSYM upload now automated in release builds

item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description:
Fixes

  • Fixed crash (EXC_BAD_ACCESS) caused by stack overflow in text annotation measurement during SwiftUI layout
  • Fixed app hanging for 5+ seconds when sensitive data detection (face/text OCR) blocked the main thread
  • Improved Sparkle update error handling and diagnostics

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
Fixes

  • Fixed app hang on launch caused by Sparkle update check blocking the main thread
  • Fixed data race in annotation and effect rendering on macOS 14

item.title: Version 1.0.9
item.description:
New

  • Custom canvas size — enter exact W×H dimensions in the aspect ratio menu
  • Save reusable size presets in Settings → Export

Fixes

  • Fixed crash when drawing annotations on macOS 14
  • Crash reporting now works — Sentry SDK properly initialized
  • Screen capture without permission no longer produces a blank screenshot — app now opens Settings and explains that permission is required

item.title: Version 1.0.8
item.description:
Improvements

  • Much better syntax highlighting — upgraded to highlight.js v11 with proper compound CSS class support
  • Richer Go and Rust coloring — package names, method calls, types, and macros now get distinct colors
  • Bold and italic font styles from themes are now preserved in code snippets
  • Full-code highlighting for exports — no more context loss at line boundaries
  • Fixed Tokyo Night theme mapping

Fixes

  • Paste (⌘V), copy (⌘C), and undo (⌘Z) now work correctly in the code editor
  • Code editor shows "Start typing..." placeholder instead of a comment

item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description:
Improvements

  • Editor window stays on top — no more losing it behind other windows
  • Resize handle cursors now work correctly when hovering over selection handles inside the canvas
  • Update dialog is now always visible for menu bar apps

Fixes

  • Pressing ESC during hotkey capture no longer opens an empty editor

item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description:
New Features

  • Solid fill redaction — completely opaque black overlay that makes data recovery impossible (unlike blur/pixelate which can be reversed)

item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description:
Improvements

  • Automatic update checks now work reliably for menu bar apps

item.title: Version 1.0.4
item.description:
New Features

  • Auto frame color — automatically detects screenshot background and matches inner padding color for a seamless look
  • Auto-beautify now adapts frame style: light screenshots get a matching frame, dark screenshots go frameless

Improvements

  • Accurate color detection preserves the original color space (Display P3) — no more color shifts
  • Edge sampling skips shadow and antialiasing artifacts for precise color matching
  • Gradient screenshots fall back to dominant area color instead of a muddy average

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
New Features

  • Smart Crop
  • Paste from Clipboard — paste images via ⌘V or from the menu bar (supports copied files too)
  • Rounded corners for rectangles — toggle continuous rounded corners on rectangle annotations
  • Freehand resize — scale freehand drawings with selection handles
  • Redesigned gradient presets — fresh curated palette organized by mood

Improvements

  • Magnifier uses rounded rectangle shape instead of circle
  • Smoother blur/pixelate regions — no jitter during drag

Fixes

  • Editor window now reappears after cancelling screenshot capture (ESC)
  • Text annotation frame matches rendered size precisely
  • Arrow and line handles positioned exactly at endpoints

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
New Features

  • Crop tool — trim screenshots to any region, with re-crop support
  • Inline text editing — edit text annotations directly on canvas (double-click to edit)
  • Text badge style — colored background with auto-contrasting text
  • Counter pin style — pin-shaped counter badges alongside classic circles
  • Canvas styling modes — None / Auto / Manual (replaces Beautify toggle, press B to cycle)
  • Pixel color sampler — hover to see hex color of any pixel

Improvements

  • Selection handles now draggable outside canvas bounds
  • Arrow and line handles offset for easier grabbing on thick strokes
  • Ruler snaps to physical pixel boundaries (Retina-aware)
  • Magnifier resizes symmetrically from center
  • Native resolution export — pixel-perfect output without scaling artifacts
  • Faster zoom controls (0.25 step, scroll-wheel sensitivity)
  • New animated mode switcher for Screenshot/Code toggle

Fixes

  • Fixed race condition in auto-detection when switching screenshots
  • Fixed keyboard shortcuts firing during text editing
  • Fixed color hex conversion for non-sRGB colors
  • Fixed potential crash from stale annotation indices

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
• New: Magnifier tool — zoom into any area of the screenshot (1.5x–5x)
  • Improved: Smarter sensitive data detection with multi-candidate OCR matching
  • Added: Automatic updates via Sparkle
